comment.text: This is a label for the user's personal document storage. It appears in various contexts, such as a download report location or a section title within dialogs.

usage.context:

 ns="Files"

 values={{ sectionName: t("Common:MyDocuments") }}
 components={{ 1: <span style={{ fontWeight: 600 }} /> }}
 />
 </Text>
